title: Teaching the foundations of AI in the classroom
summary: Experience AI is a free educational program from Google DeepMind and the Raspberry Pi Foundation that helps teachers introduce AI and machine learning in classrooms. It provides research-backed lessons, videos, worksheets, and training designed for educators of all technical backgrounds. The program has reached educators and students in over 165 countries.
